name: feature.assistant.nodes
description: Executive-Assistant graph/logic node pack (ADR 0023 / 0014). THIN by design — only the memory-graph + prioritization nodes over ctx.features.assistant + ctx.kanban. Full coverage of the assistant surface: commitment / decision / meeting / stakeholder reads + writes (role:action, recorded → replay-safe) alongside the original perception + prioritization + briefing nodes. ALL external I/O (Drive/Gmail/Calendar reads, mail sends) reuses the existing core node packs (core.openwop.{mcp,http,integration}); this pack authors no I/O node.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Upsert Commitment
nodes.description: Upserts a commitment into the memory graph from an extracted item (owner/description/source/dueAt), over ctx.features.assistant. Idempotent by (source hash + description) — replay/fork never duplicates.

nodes.label: Populate Board
nodes.description: Projects a commitment onto the owner's kanban board as an agent-sourced card (ctx.features.assistant.projectToBoard). Idempotent by the commitment's card back-ref — no duplicate card across runs (Loop 3).

nodes.label: Prioritize
nodes.description: Scores a surface item on the signal weights of the active prioritization profile and buckets it surface | handle | defer (ADR 0023 §4). Pure + deterministic (replay-stable).

nodes.label: Compose Briefing
nodes.description: Reads the memory graph (open commitments, upcoming meetings, pending approvals) over ctx.features.assistant and composes a structured morning/weekly brief for delivery via Notifications.

nodes.label: Enqueue Pending Action
nodes.description: Drafts an outbound action (email/invite/reschedule/nudge) onto the approval queue (ctx.features.assistant.enqueueAction). Draft-only — nothing sends until the principal approves via the heartbeat/Notifications loop (ADR 0025 §4).

nodes.label: Ingest Commitments
nodes.description: Deterministic perception leg of Loops 1/6 (ADR 0023 §12 T2): maps a fetched Calendar/Drive listing (core.openwop.http.fetch + ADR 0024 Phase D connection) into idempotent commitment upserts over ctx.features.assistant. SourceRefs stamped contentTrust:'untrusted' (ADR 0027); maxItemsPerTick caps a tick's writes.

nodes.label: Prepare Action Request
nodes.description: Pure transform (ADR 0023 §12 T6): maps an approved PendingAction (kind/payload/draft) into the HTTP request body + URL variables the execution workflow's core.openwop.http.fetch node dispatches under the approving principal's write-scoped connection. Deterministic / replay-stable.

nodes.label: Confirm Action Send
nodes.description: Execution verdict for assistant action workflows (ADR 0023 §12 T6): fails the run unless the upstream provider call answered 2xx — core.openwop.http.fetch deliberately completes on any outcome (side-effect-once), so this gate is what keeps a refused send from being recorded as sent.

nodes.label: Assistant: List Projects
nodes.description: Lists the principal's projects over ctx.features.assistant.listProjects. Output: { projects }. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Assistant: Get Project
nodes.description: Fetches one project by id over ctx.features.assistant.getProject. Inputs: { projectId }. Output: { project } (null when absent).

nodes.label: Assistant: List Commitments
nodes.description: Lists commitments from the memory graph over ctx.features.assistant.listCommitments. Inputs: { status?, projectId? }. Output: { commitments }.

nodes.label: Assistant: List Decisions
nodes.description: Lists logged decisions over ctx.features.assistant.listDecisions. Inputs: { projectId? }. Output: { decisions }.

nodes.label: Assistant: Get Meeting
nodes.description: Fetches one meeting by id over ctx.features.assistant.getMeeting. Inputs: { meetingId }. Output: { meeting } (null when absent).

nodes.label: Assistant: List Meetings
nodes.description: Lists recorded meetings over ctx.features.assistant.listMeetings. Output: { meetings }.

nodes.label: Assistant: List Stakeholders
nodes.description: Lists relationship stakeholders over ctx.features.assistant.listStakeholders. Output: { stakeholders }.

nodes.label: Assistant: List Pending Actions
nodes.description: Lists the approval queue over ctx.features.assistant.listPendingActions. Inputs: { status? }. Output: { pendingActions }.

nodes.label: Assistant: Set Commitment Card
nodes.description: Links a commitment to its kanban card (back-ref) over ctx.features.assistant.setCommitmentCard. Inputs: { commitmentId, kanbanCardId }. Output: { commitment }. Idempotent update.

nodes.label: Assistant: Log Decision
nodes.description: Appends a decision to the memory graph over ctx.features.assistant.logDecision. Inputs: { statement, decidedBy?, source?, rationale?, projectId? }. Output: { decision }. Recorded → replay reads the recorded result.

nodes.label: Assistant: Record Meeting
nodes.description: Upserts a meeting record (by calendarEventId) over ctx.features.assistant.recordMeeting. Inputs: { calendarEventId, title, startAt, endAt?, prepBriefRef?, transcriptKbDocId? }. Output: { meeting }.

nodes.label: Assistant: Upsert Stakeholder
nodes.description: Upserts a relationship stakeholder (by person) over ctx.features.assistant.upsertStakeholder. Inputs: { person, importance?, intendedCadenceDays?, lastMeaningfulContactAt? }. Output: { stakeholder }.
